analysis.name: Impossible Cloud Network Token
analysis.summary: ICNT近期因Bybit EU上线、Binance Alpha及期货上线等利好催化，价格有所上涨，但24小时下跌7.44%，短期波动大。项目基本面扎实，DePIN+AI云服务，年化收入超700万美元，但流通市值仅5122万美元，FDV达1.41亿美元，解锁压力较大。当前价格较ATH跌66%，估值合理但需关注解锁和流动性风险。

recommendation.invalidation: 跌破0.18美元支撑位或出现大额解锁公告

catalysts: Bybit EU上线并推出30万ICNT奖励活动
项目年化收入超700万美元，基本面支撑

latestNews.title: Bybit EU Lists Impossible Cloud Network Token (ICNT), Launches 300,000 ICNT Token Splash Campaign
latestNews.reason: 新交易所上线带来流动性和曝光，激励活动吸引用户

latestNews.title: Impossible Cloud Network Token (ICNT): AI cloud protocol with over $7M in ARR
latestNews.reason: 展示实际收入，增强基本面信心

fundamentals: 去中心化云基础设施协议，提供存储、计算、网络服务
代币用于节点抵押、服务支付和社区质押
总供应量7亿，流通量2.54亿，流通率36.3%
FDV 1.41亿美元，市值5122万美元，估值中等
marketRead: 24小时价格下跌7.44%，但7日上涨3.95%，短期回调
DEX流动性7897万美元，相对充足
成交量280万美元，交易活跃度一般
价格较ATH下跌66%，处于相对低位
risks: 解锁风险：总供应量仅流通36.3%，未来解锁可能带来抛压
竞争激烈：云服务赛道已有Filecoin、Arweave等强手
市场情绪：近期大盘波动，ICNT跟随回调
合约风险：DEX交易对存在无常损失风险
watchlist: 解锁时间表及大额转账
Binance和Bybit上线后的交易量变化
项目收入增长及合作伙伴进展
sourceNotes: 数据来自CoinGecko和DexScreener，新闻来自Google News聚合
部分新闻日期为2025年，但收集时间为2026年，可能存在延迟
无链上持仓分布数据，无法评估大户行为

profile.name: Impossible Cloud Network Token
profile.description: Impossible Cloud Network (ICN) is a decentralized infrastructure protocol that provides enterprise-grade cloud services including storage, compute, and networking. Built as a multi-service DePIN platform, ICN enables hardware providers to contribute resources and service providers to access them using the native token ICNT. The network supports real-world enterprise use cases and is designed to offer high performance, security, and censorship resistance. ICNT is used for collateral by node operators, access to resources by service providers, and staking by the community to secure and participate in the protocol.
